vocab.meaning: những đỉnh núi hiểm trở, nhô cao
vocab.example: The sight of the craggy peaks shrouded in mist is far more compelling to me than any tropical beach.
I am particularly fond of driving along a shimmering coastline where the light reflects off the water at dusk.
There's nothing quite as invigorating as breathing in the crisp, clean alpine air during a morning hike.
I prefer the sea because the mild maritime climate is much more agreeable to me than the harsh mountain cold.

vocab.meaning: những đỉnh núi phủ tuyết trắng
vocab.example: I’ve always dreamed of witnessing the majesty of snow-capped summits in the Himalayas firsthand.
Spending an afternoon in a tranquil cove away from the tourist crowds is my idea of a perfect getaway.
I find wandering through a dense coniferous forest on a mountainside to be an incredibly grounding experience.
Mesmerized by the undulating waves, I can sit on the shore for hours without feeling a hint of boredom.
The dramatic landscape of sheer cliffs dropping into the ocean is a spectacle that never fails to amaze me.

vocab.meaning: thích thú/phát triển tốt trong sự biệt lập
vocab.example: I tend to favor the mountains because I thrive in the solitude that high-altitude environments provide.
